summary: Iteration 12: Comprehensive testing of NEW features - Stats page, Mood system, Public org pages, Push notifications, Telegram admin panel. All 29 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified public pages (/stats, /org/{id}) load correctly without auth, show animated counters, mood gauge, councils by level, top orgs, and rating distribution.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/stats/public - Returns user count, review count, org count, council counts by level, top orgs (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/stats/public - Returns council_by_level with all 5 levels (yard, district, city, republic, country)
BACKEND: GET /api/stats/public - Returns top_orgs sorted by rating
BACKEND: GET /api/stats/mood - Returns global mood aggregation with dominant mood and average score (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/stats/mood/{council_id} - Returns per-council mood stats (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/mood - Requires authentication (401)
BACKEND: POST /api/mood - Sets user mood successfully with auth (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/mood - Rejects invalid mood value (400)
BACKEND: POST /api/mood - Sets mood for specific council (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/mood - Requires authentication (401)
BACKEND: GET /api/mood - Returns user's moods with auth (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/org/{org_id}/public - Returns org with reviews and rating distribution (200)
BACKEND: GET /api/org/{org_id}/public - Returns rating distribution 1-5
BACKEND: GET /api/org/{org_id}/public - Returns 404 for non-existent org
BACKEND: GET /api/push/vapid-key - Returns VAPID public key (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/push/subscribe - Requires authentication (401)
BACKEND: POST /api/push/subscribe - Saves subscription with auth (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/push/subscribe - Rejects missing subscription (400)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/telegram/config - Requires admin role (403)
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/telegram/config - Returns config for admin (200, bots MOCKED)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/telegram/staff - Requires admin role (403)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/telegram/staff - Adds staff member with admin (200)
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/telegram/staff - Rejects missing telegram_user_id (400)
BACKEND: All 6 mood levels valid (excellent, normal, mild_upset, dissatisfaction, stress, anger)
FRONTEND: /stats page loads without auth - shows 'Публичная статистика' title
FRONTEND: /stats page shows 4 animated counter cards (Граждане, Отзывы, Организации, Проблемы)
FRONTEND: /stats page shows MoodGauge component with gradient bar and mood breakdown
FRONTEND: /stats page shows 'Советы по уровням' section with 5 level counts
FRONTEND: /stats page shows 'Рейтинг организаций' with top orgs list
FRONTEND: /org/{orgId} page loads without auth - shows org name, description, address
FRONTEND: /org/{orgId} page shows rating distribution bars (1-5 stars)
FRONTEND: /org/{orgId} page shows reviews list with status indicators
FRONTEND: Navigation from /stats to /org/{id} works correctly
FRONTEND: /profile page requires auth (redirects to login)
FRONTEND: /councils page requires auth (redirects to login)
FRONTEND: AppLayout sidebar includes Stats nav item (BarChart3 icon, 'Статистика' label)
FRONTEND: ProfilePage has PushNotificationToggle component (data-testid='push-toggle-card')
FRONTEND: ProfilePage has MoodSelector component (data-testid='mood-selector-card')
FRONTEND: CouncilsPage has CouncilMoodGauge component (data-testid='council-mood-gauge')
critical_code_review_comments: Public pages (/stats, /org/{id}) correctly accessible without auth
Mood system working - global and per-council mood aggregation
Push notification infrastructure in place (VAPID keys configured)
Telegram admin panel MOCKED (tokens not configured as expected)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Set user_eec305b08f9c as admin for telegram admin panel testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 tested all NEW features: 1) Public stats page at /stats with animated counters, mood gauge, councils by level, top orgs - accessible without auth. 2) Public org pages at /org/{orgId} with reviews and rating distribution - accessible without auth. 3) Mood system - POST/GET /api/mood for setting/getting user moods, GET /api/stats/mood for global aggregation, GET /api/stats/mood/{council_id} for per-council stats. 4) Push notifications - VAPID keys configured, subscribe endpoint working. 5) Telegram admin panel - MOCKED (tokens empty). ProfilePage has PushNotificationToggle and MoodSelector components. CouncilsPage has CouncilMoodGauge in council detail view.

mocked_apis.telegram_bot: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN empty - user bot not configured
mocked_apis.telegram_admin_bot: TELEGRAM_ADMIN_BOT_TOKEN empty - admin bot not configured
mocked_apis.push_notifications: Backend infrastructure ready, but end-to-end testing requires browser push API
